title: Rachel Zegler: What Happened and Key Details

Key details: The strongest details currently available from the source set are: Deadline reported: 'Evita' Starring Rachel Zegler Sets Broadway Opening Date, Venue. Time Out Worldwide reported: Don't cry, Broadway-Rachel Zegler will bring her Evita here. facebook.com reported: The Broadway revival of Evita starring Rachel Zegler will begin performances February 27, 2027, at the Winter Garden Theatre, with opening night on March 25. Read more below.. playbill.com reported: Jamie Lloyd-Directed Evita Finds a Broadway Home. Broadway Shows reported: Hello, Buenos Aires! Evita, Starring Rachel Zegler, to Play Broadway's Winter Garden Theatre. These points are intentionally limited to what the source headlines and trend data support. If a detail is not visible in the source set, this article does not treat it as confirmed.
